MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott T. Okamoto, esq. (415-766-5871) for Defendant/opposing party Henry Tang.
No other appearances.

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
